content: Bit of a nothing day today. My head hurt all day until just now. Even spent half an hour meditating in the bath. I won't be doing that again. I was too distracted by slipping down into the water. I've been looking at the Monroe Institute for spiritual access and energy meditations. I have this theory that empathy is actually a form of emotional/energy telepathy. And I think I really do believe in this whole open contact 2027 thing. Started off as just a fun idea but it's really starting to grow on me. Bashar has got into my head.
